seo.title: Electrics Contractor Pros | Dallas Electrician | Electrical Services
seo.description: Top-rated Dallas electrician with 5.0 stars. Expert electrical repairs, installations, and upgrades. Call (214) 276-8442 for fast, reliable service.

hero.headline: Expert Electrical Solutions for Your Home & Business
hero.subheadline: From emergency repairs to full rewiring, our licensed electricians deliver safe, code-compliant work with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Electrical Contractor in Dallas
featureSections.body: Whether you need a simple outlet repair or a complete panel upgrade, Electrics Contractor Pros handles it all. Our team is licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.
bullets: Free estimates on all major projects
featureSections.cardBody: Every job meets or exceeds National Electrical Code standards. We pull permits and schedule inspections so you're fully protected.

featureSections.title: Smart Home & Energy Efficiency
featureSections.subheadline: Upgrade your home with smart switches, dimmers, thermostats, and energy-saving LED lighting. Save money and increase comfort.
featureSections.body: Our electricians are trained on the latest smart home systems. We install and configure everything from smart panels to whole-home surge protectors.
featureSections.cardBody: Switching to LED can cut lighting costs by up to 75%. We'll help you choose the best fixtures for your space.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Fully licensed in Texas with liability and worker's comp insurance. Your property is protected.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: Upfront flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees. You'll know the cost before we start.

whyChooseUs.title: Same-Day Service
whyChooseUs.description: Most service calls are scheduled within 24 hours. Emergency slots available.

whyChooseUs.title: 5-Star Reputation
whyChooseUs.description: Rated 5.0 stars by our customers. We don't rest until you're completely satisfied.

testimonials.quote: They rewired our entire 1920s home. Professional, clean, and on budget. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: Called at 9 PM for a power outage. They arrived within an hour and fixed it fast. Amazing service.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: Installed a new panel and EV charger. Explained everything clearly. Great experience.
testimonials.author: Linda R.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Call us or book online for a free estimate. Same-day service available.

servicesPage.intro: From minor repairs to major installations, our Dallas electricians handle it all with expertise and care. Every service comes with our 100% satisfaction guarantee.

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable repairs for outlets, switches, breakers, and more.
services.longDescription: Our experienced electricians diagnose and fix electrical issues quickly. Whether it's a flickering light, a dead outlet, or a tripping breaker, we'll find the root cause and repair it safely. We use advanced diagnostic tools to minimize downtime.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We inspect the issue and test circuits to pinpoint the problem.

process.title: Repair Plan
process.description: We explain the repair needed, provide a flat-rate quote, and get your approval.

process.title: Completion
process.description: We perform the repair, clean up, and test everything to ensure it works perfectly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service. In most cases, we can have a technician at your location within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faqs.answer: No, all estimates are free. We provide a detailed quote before any work begins.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Rewiring
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel or rewire your home for safety and capacity.
services.longDescription: Older homes often have outdated panels that can't handle modern loads. Our panel upgrades increase capacity and improve safety. We also offer full or partial rewiring for homes with knob-and-tube or aluminum wiring.
benefits: Eliminate flickering lights and tripping breakers
Support for modern appliances and electronics
Increased home value and insurance savings

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current panel and load requirements.

process.title: Permitting
process.description: We handle all permits and schedule inspections.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Professional installation with minimal disruption. We test and verify.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: Signs include frequent breaker trips, buzzing sounds, or if your panel is over 25 years old. We offer free inspections.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most upgrades are completed in one day. We'll coordinate with the utility for any necessary disconnects.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Indoor and outdoor lighting solutions for ambiance, security, and efficiency.
services.longDescription: Transform your space with custom lighting. We install recessed, track, pendant, chandeliers, and landscape lighting. Our team also offers smart lighting controls for convenience and energy savings.
benefits: Enhanced curb appeal with outdoor lighting
Smart controls via app or voice

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, budget, and needs.

process.title: Design
process.description: We create a lighting plan with fixture recommendations.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Expert installation and programming of smart features.

faqs.question: Can you install low-voltage landscape lighting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in low-voltage systems that are safe and energy-efficient.

faqs.question: Do you offer dimmer switches?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We install dimmers and smart switches for any compatible fixture.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of Level 2 EV chargers for your home or business.
services.longDescription: Prepare for the future of transportation with a dedicated EV charging station. We install all major brands including Tesla, ChargePoint, and JuiceBox. Our work includes panel assessment, wiring, and mounting.

process.title: Site Visit
process.description: We assess your panel capacity and determine the best location.

process.title: Permitting
process.description: We secure necessary permits and coordinate with your utility.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install the charger, run conduit, and test the system.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit for EV charger installation?
faqs.answer: Yes, most municipalities require a permit. We handle that for you.

faqs.question: How long does installation take?
faqs.answer: Typically 3-5 hours for a standard installation. More complex jobs may take longer.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Electrical Contractor Since 2008
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services that exceed customer expectations.
story: Electrics Contractor Pros was founded by master electrician John Davis, who saw a need for honest, high-quality electrical work in Dallas. Starting with a single truck, John built a reputation for integrity and craftsmanship. Today, we're a team of 15 licensed electricians serving thousands of satisfied customers.

We believe in continuous training, using the latest tools, and treating every home like our own. Our 5.0-star rating reflects our commitment to excellence. Whether it's a small repair or a large commercial project, we bring the same dedication to every job.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every job follows strict protocols.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest advice, transparent pricing, and no shortcuts.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and finish on schedule.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: Continuous improvement and mastery of our craft.

contact.headline: Contact Electrics Contractor Pros
contact.subheadline: We're here to help with all your electrical needs. Call or fill out the form.
